package rulecoverage

func NegativeTxBeginPerItemLoop() string {
    ruleID := "tx_begin_per_item_loop"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Transactions started inside loops instead of once around the wider batch."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
